answer: SELECT AVG(explainability_score) FROM creative_ai WHERE region IN ('Europe', 'North America');
DELETE FROM rural_infrastructure WHERE country = 'Indonesia' AND completion_date < '2010-01-01';
SELECT launch_provider, COUNT(*) AS accident_count FROM Accidents WHERE launch_provider IN ('SpaceX', 'Blue Origin') GROUP BY launch_provider;
SELECT SUM(budget) FROM Movies_Release_Year WHERE release_year < 2010;
INSERT INTO attorneys (attorney_name, attorney_email, attorney_phone) VALUES ('Oliver Martinez', 'oliver.martinez@lawfirm.com', '555-555-5678');
SELECT plant_name, AVG(co2_emission_per_ton_produced) AS avg_co2_emission_per_ton FROM co2_emissions GROUP BY plant_name ORDER BY avg_co2_emission_per_ton DESC LIMIT 2;
SELECT SUM(total_cost) FROM climate_communication WHERE location = 'Antarctica' AND YEAR(end_date) > 2010;
SELECT AVG(publications) FROM researchers WHERE organization = 'National Geographic';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dapp_ranking WHERE dapp_region = 'Asia-Pacific';
SELECT * FROM forests WHERE hectares > 1000000 AND country IN ('Canada', 'USA');
SELECT MAX(response_time) FROM emergency_calls WHERE city = 'Los Angeles';
